task_completion.description: Navigate to the Pharmacy administration section in OpenEMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR interface with the menu 'Administration' > 'Practice' > 'Pharmacies' selected, or the 'Pharmacies' list view visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Pharmacy Name and NPI number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Add Pharmacy' or 'Edit Pharmacy' form showing the 'Name' field filled with 'CVS Pharmacy #8472' and the 'NPI' field filled with '1234567890'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct address, city, state, and zip code
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the form showing 'Address' as '2150 Commonwealth Avenue', 'City' as 'Boston', 'State' as 'MA', and 'Zip' as '02135'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct phone, fax, and email information
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the form showing 'Phone' as '(617) 555-0142', 'Fax' as '(617) 555-0143', and 'Email' as 'rx8472@cvs.com'.

task_completion.description: Save the new pharmacy and verify it appears in the pharmacy list
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Pharmacy list containing a row for 'CVS Pharmacy #8472' with the correct location details (Boston, MA), or a success message confirming the addition.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR web interface via a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser window displaying the OpenEMR application, not a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is filling out the form fields manually using the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the form fields being populated or the agent clicking the 'Save' button within the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the actual OpenEMR software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard OpenEMR layout and styling, not a text document or mock-up.
